title: Silk Route Spice Company Giant Sea Salt Grinder 360g
features: High Quality: Silk Route's Atlantic sea salt grinder contains nothing less than grade-A Atlantic sea salt.
Perfect Addition: The salt in our Atlantic sea salt grinders is 100% natural; formed by the cold waters of the Atlantic, it is then crystallized naturally under the warm desert sun.
Easy To Use: Enjoy the simplicity of seasoning with our spices, thoughtfully packaged in user-friendly giant spice grinders.
Preferred By Chefs: Silk Route superior spices are preferred by chefs across the UK.
Recyclable: Our grinders can be recyclable after use.
description: Product Description Why Choose Silk Route's Spice Grinders 1. Fully Recyclable Our spices are a chef's go-to for bold flavours, designed with sustainability in mind. Recyclable after use, savour the taste support the planet! 2. Flavoursome Not only are our easy to use grinders fantastic looking, they are also very flavoursome. Use to season meats, vegetables, pasta, pizza and more! 3. Top Quality We have spent much time sourcing the finest ingredients from around the world, to deliver only the most premium spices straight to your front door. 4. Collection Discover the entire collection of spice grinders, from our Himalayan Pink Salt, Whole Black Peppercorn to our Chilli Lover.
